/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/waydroid_xr_server.dir/src/waydroid_xr_server.c.o CMakeFiles/waydroid_xr_server.dir/src/ipc_server.c.o CMakeFiles/waydroid_xr_server.dir/src/openxr_host.c.o CMakeFiles/waydroid_xr_server.dir/src/dma_buf_import.c.o CMakeFiles/waydroid_xr_server.dir/src/gpu_sync.c.o CMakeFiles/waydroid_xr_server.dir/src/graphics_binding.c.o -o waydroid_xr_server  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/riyananosh/waydroid-xr-stubs/host/build/_deps/openxr-build/src/loader _deps/openxr-build/src/loader/libopenxr_loader.dylib -lpthread
